---
title: "About"
---

*[Version française](about.qmd)*

## Research

My work sits at the intersection of French private law and contemporary 
legal challenges, with a particular focus on civil liability, insurance 
law, environmental law, and digital law.

**Civil law and special contracts.** I study the French law of 
obligations and special contracts (*contrats spéciaux*), with a focus 
on ongoing legislative reform. I co-author a biannual case law chronicle 
on property law (*droit des biens*) in the *Gazette du Palais*. From 
2024 to 2025, I served as an expert adviser to the French Ministry of 
Justice on the reform of special contracts.

**Insurance law.** Insurance law is my primary specialization. I serve 
as scientific director of the *JurisClasseur Responsabilité civile et 
Assurances* encyclopedia (LexisNexis), one of the leading French legal 
reference works in this field. My research focuses on emerging risks — 
climate, pandemic, artificial intelligence, and cyber risks — and their 
insurability.

**Environmental private law.** I work on corporate due diligence 
obligations (*devoir de vigilance*) under French and European law, 
climate liability, and the legal status of natural commons (*communs 
naturels*).

**Digital law.** I research AI liability, cybersecurity, and the 
regulation of digital infrastructures, including through an ongoing 
contribution to the *JurisClasseur* encyclopedia on digital risks in 
insurance law.

---

## Collective research

I have organized several colloquia and edited collective volumes on 
civil law, insurance law, and environmental private law. I am a member 
of two interdisciplinary research groups: one on low-tech ; the other on the insurability of coastal risks (led by Caroline Rufin-Soler).

---

## Academic profile

Antoine Touzain is *professeur agrégé de droit privé* at the Université 
Rouen Normandie (CUREJ research unit). The title of *professeur agrégé* 
is awarded through a national competitive examination (*agrégation*) 
and corresponds to the highest rank in the French academic system, 
equivalent to a full professorship. He directs the Master 2 in Liability 
and Insurance Law (DRAD) and the law department of his university.

---

## Contact and collaboration

I welcome invitations to colloquia, collaborative research projects, 
and exchanges with colleagues working on related topics. Feel free to 
[get in touch](contact.qmd).
